ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "uri" TEXT /* URI of the song on the platform */,
  "genre" INTEGER /* Genre of the song (e.g., 0 for unknown) */,
  "key" REAL /* Key of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song in decibels */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song in beats per minute */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the song is explicit or not */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in milliseconds */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the song */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "parent_genre_id" INTEGER /* Parent genre ID (for hierarchical genres) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Genre of the artist */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the artist (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the artist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artists_genre_id FOREIGN KEY ("genre_id") REFERENCES genres ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Artist who released the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the album */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total tracks in the album */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label of the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_albums" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* ID of the album */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number of the song in the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id", "album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the user */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers of the playlist */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Whether the playlist is public or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_songs" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date when the song was added to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., play, pause) */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the activity in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_value" REAL /* Value of the feature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_features_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artist_popularity" (
  "popularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each popularity record */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the artist */,
  "popularity_date" TEXT /* Date of the popularity score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("popularity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_artist_popularity_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_popularity" (
  "popularity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each popularity record */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song */,
  "popularity_score" REAL /* Popularity score of the song */,
  "popularity_date" TEXT /* Date of the popularity score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("popularity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_popularity_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_teams" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "team_id")
)
column_names: URI of the song on the platform
